title: Redpoint RPI Helm Chart Values
description: Configuration values for the Redpoint Interaction (RPI) Helm chart v7.7

nameOverride.description: Override the chart name used in resource names

fullnameOverride.description: Override the fully qualified app name used in resource names

global.description: Global settings shared across all chart components

mode.description: Deployment mode: standard (production deployment) or demo (embedded MSSQL + MongoDB for local dev/evaluation).

platform.description: Cloud environment: azure, amazon, google, or selfhosted

images.description: Container image settings for all RPI services

registry.description: Container image registry and repository path

imagePullSecret.description: Image pull secret for private registries

name.description: Name of the Kubernetes image pull secret

overrides.description: Per-service image overrides. When set, the value is used verbatim instead of {registry}/{service-name}:{tag}. Useful for flat registries (e.g., ECR with all images in a single repo).

podTimezone.description: Set the pod timezone (e.g., 'America/New_York'); leave empty for default UTC

databases.description: Database configuration for operational and data warehouse connections

server_host.description: Database server hostname or IP address

pulse_database_name.description: Name of the Pulse operational database

pulse_logging_database_name.description: Name of the Pulse logging database

encrypt.description: Enable TLS encryption for database connections

keyName.description: Key file name within the ConfigMap

cloudIdentity.description: Pod-to-cloud authentication. Required for sdk and csi secrets modes. Authentication mechanism derived from global.deployment.platform.

enabled.description: Enable cloud identity for pod authentication to cloud services

serviceAccount.description: ServiceAccount configuration. create=true uses one shared SA; create=false creates per-service SAs.

create.description: Create a single shared ServiceAccount for all services

managedIdentityClientId.description: Azure Managed Identity Client ID for Workload Identity

configMapName.description: ConfigMap containing the service account JSON credentials

keyName.description: Key file name within the ConfigMap

roleArn.description: IAM Role ARN for IRSA (IAM Roles for Service Accounts)

useAccessKeys.description: Inject AWS access keys from the main K8s Secret (AWS_Access_Key_ID, AWS_Secret_Access_Key)

secretsManagement.description: How secrets are provided to pods: kubernetes (K8s Secret), sdk (cloud vault at runtime), or csi (CSI driver syncs vault to K8s Secret)

autoCreateSecrets.description: Automatically create K8s secrets from values

sdk.description: SDK settings — app reads from cloud vault directly (provider: sdk)

configurationReloadIntervalSeconds.description: Interval in seconds to reload configuration from vault

useADTokenForDatabaseConnection.description: Use Azure AD token for database connections

secretTagKey.description: Tag key used to filter secrets in AWS Secrets Manager

projectId.description: Google Cloud project ID for Secret Manager

csi.description: CSI driver settings — syncs cloud vault to K8s Secret (provider: csi)

secretName.description: K8s secret name created by the CSI driver

storage.description: Storage configuration for persistent volume claims and volumes

storageClass.description: Optional StorageClass for CSI-backed storage (EFS, Azure File, etc.)

DataManagementUploadDirectory.description: PVC for data management upload directory

persistentVolumes.description: Create PV + PVC pairs (for CSI-backed storage)

realtimeapi.description: Realtime API service configuration — handles real-time decisioning, caching, and queue processing

replicas.description: Number of Realtime API pod replicas

rpiClientID.description: RPI Client ID (GUID) for this realtime instance

type.description: Authentication type for the Realtime API

CORSOrigins.description: Allowed CORS origins for the Realtime API

type.description: Redis deployment type: internal (chart-managed) or external (BYO)

queueNames.description: Queue name configuration for each message type

azureservicebus.description: Azure Service Bus queue provider settings

azureeventhubs.description: Azure Event Hubs queue provider settings

type.description: RabbitMQ deployment type: internal (chart-managed) or external (BYO)

resources.description: CPU and memory resource requests and limits

callbackapi.description: Callback API service configuration — handles callback channel processing (e.g., SendGrid)

replicas.description: Number of Callback API pod replicas

instances.description: List of tenant instances when multitenancy is enabled

resources.description: CPU and memory resource requests and limits

executionservice.description: Execution Service configuration — handles selection rule execution and job processing

replicas.description: Number of Execution Service pod replicas

enableRPIAuthentication.description: Enable RPI authentication for this service

type.description: Redis deployment type: internal (chart-managed) or external (BYO)

resources.description: CPU and memory resource requests and limits

interactionapi.description: Interaction API service configuration — main API for client/UI interactions

replicas.description: Number of Interaction API pod replicas

enableRPIAuthentication.description: Enable RPI authentication for this service

resources.description: CPU and memory resource requests and limits

integrationapi.description: Integration API service configuration — handles external system integrations and Smart Activation communication

replicas.description: Number of Integration API pod replicas

enableRPIAuthentication.description: Enable RPI authentication for this service

username.description: Integration API credentials username (required if Smart Activation is enabled)

resources.description: CPU and memory resource requests and limits

nodemanager.description: Node Manager service configuration — manages cluster node operations

replicas.description: Number of Node Manager pod replicas

enableRPIAuthentication.description: Enable RPI authentication for this service

resources.description: CPU and memory resource requests and limits

deploymentapi.description: Deployment API service configuration — manages tenant provisioning and database upgrades

replicas.description: Number of Deployment API pod replicas

templateTenant.description: Template tenant configuration for new tenant creation

volumeClaimName.description: Volume claim name for template files

resources.description: CPU and memory resource requests and limits

queuereader.description: Queue Reader service configuration — processes messages from the realtime queue

replicas.description: Number of Queue Reader pod replicas

isDistributed.description: Enable distributed processing for high-volume transactions

internalCache.description: Internal cache configuration for queue reader

tenantIds.description: RPI client IDs (GUIDs) for this queue reader cluster
RPI client IDs (GUIDs) — alternative top-level placement

resources.description: CPU and memory resource requests and limits

enabled.description: Enable the Rebrandly URL shortener service

secretName.description: Kubernetes secret name for Rebrandly credentials

type.description: Redis deployment type: internal or external

resources.description: CPU and memory resource requests and limits

diagnosticsMode.description: Diagnostics mode configuration for troubleshooting and monitoring

copytoAzureBlob.description: Copy diagnostics to Azure Blob Storage

UseDataLakeStorageGen2.description: Use Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2

MicrosoftEntraID.description: Microsoft Entra ID (formerly Azure AD) authentication configuration

interaction_client_id.description: Entra ID application (client) ID for Interaction

OpenIdProviders.description: OpenID Connect provider configuration for SSO

logoutIdTokenParameter.description: Parameter name for ID token on logout

supportsUserManagement.description: Whether the provider supports user management

ingress.description: Ingress configuration for external access to RPI services

enabled.description: Deploy a chart-managed ingress controller (false if supplying your own)

mode.description: Ingress mode: public (internet-facing) or private (internal only)

certificateSource.description: TLS certificate source: kubernetes (K8s Secret) or acm (AWS Certificate Manager)

hosts.description: Service hostnames — subdomains are prepended to domain; values with a dot are used as FQDNs

callbackapi.description: Callback API hostname or subdomain (or FQDN)

annotations.description: Custom ingress annotations (replaces defaults when set)

className.description: Ingress class name override (defaults to release namespace)

servers.description: Linkerd Server CRDs for L7 traffic policy

nodeSelector.description: Kubernetes node selector for pod scheduling

tolerations.description: Kubernetes tolerations for pod scheduling on tainted nodes

redpointAI.description: Redpoint AI configuration for natural language, cognitive search, and model storage

naturalLanguage.description: Natural language AI settings (OpenAI / Azure OpenAI)

ConnectionString.description: Azure Storage connection string for models

smartActivation.description: Smart Activation (CDP) master toggle and secrets

autoCreateSecrets.description: Automatically create secrets for Smart Activation

secretName.description: Kubernetes secret name for Smart Activation

replicas.description: Number of Auth Service pod replicas

resources.description: CPU and memory resource requests and limits
CPU and memory resource requests and limits

replicas.description: Number of Init Service pod replicas

resources.description: CPU and memory resource requests and limits

messageq.description: Message Queue service configuration (Smart Activation component)

replicas.description: Number of Message Queue pod replicas

resources.description: CPU and memory resource requests and limits

replicas.description: Number of Maintenance Service pod replicas

resources.description: CPU and memory resource requests and limits

replicas.description: Number of Services API pod replicas

resources.description: CPU and memory resource requests and limits
CPU and memory resource requests and limits

replicas.description: Number of UI Service pod replicas

resources.description: CPU and memory resource requests and limits

cdpcache.description: CDP Cache service configuration (Smart Activation component)

replicas.description: Number of CDP Cache pod replicas

resources.description: CPU and memory resource requests and limits

customLabels.description: Custom labels applied to all chart resources

customAnnotations.description: Custom annotations applied to all chart resources

customMetrics.description: Enable Prometheus scrape annotations on all RPI service pods

enabled.description: Enable Prometheus metrics annotations on all services

postInstall.description: Post-install automation: license activation, cluster DB install, and optional tenant creation. Runs as a Helm post-install hook.

existingSecret.description: Use an existing K8s secret instead of inline values (keys: activation-key, admin-password, admin-username, admin-email)

dataWarehouse.description: Data warehouse configuration for the tenant

waitTimeout.description: Timeout in seconds to wait for services to be ready

backoffLimit.description: Number of retries before considering the job failed

preflight.description: Pre-flight validation: checks DNS, DB connectivity, cloud identity, and secrets management before deployment

mode.description: Preflight mode: test (runs with helm test) or preInstall (blocks install on failure)

databaseUpgrade.description: Automatic database upgrade job — calls the upgrade endpoint after an image tag change

notification.description: Email notification settings for upgrade completion

validationPods.description: Validation pods that verify storage mounts and CSI secret mounts are working

deployments.description: List of validation pod deployment definitions

mountPath.description: Mount path in the test pod

serviceAccountName.description: Service account name for the test pod

image.description: Container image for the test pod

securityContext.description: Global pod security context overrides (merged with defaults from _defaults.tpl)

livenessProbe.description: Global liveness probe overrides (merged with defaults from _defaults.tpl)

readinessProbe.description: Global readiness probe overrides (merged with defaults from _defaults.tpl)

startupProbe.description: Global startup probe overrides (merged with defaults from _defaults.tpl)

topologySpreadConstraints.description: Global topology spread constraints overrides (merged with defaults from _defaults.tpl)

cdpmessageq.description: CDP Message Queue storage configuration (Smart Activation component)

existingClaim.description: Use an existing PVC for message queue storage

enabled.description: Enable dynamic volume provisioning (disable to use existingClaim)

resources.description: Global resource defaults applied to all services. Per-service overrides take priority.

podAntiAffinity.description: Pod anti-affinity settings applied to all services

weight.description: Weight for preferred anti-affinity (1-100, ignored for required)

commonAnnotations.description: Annotations applied to all resource types (ServiceAccounts, Services, Deployments, Pods)

serviceAccountAnnotations.description: Additional annotations for ServiceAccounts (merged with commonAnnotations)

serviceAnnotations.description: Additional annotations for Services (merged with commonAnnotations)

nodeProvisioning.description: Node provisioning for dedicated RPI nodes (Karpenter NodePool)

customCACerts.description: Mount custom CA certificates into all pods

name.description: Name of the ConfigMap or Secret containing CA certificates

mountPath.description: Mount path for CA certificates inside the container

certFile.description: Optional: specific CA bundle filename. When set, SSL_CERT_FILE env var is set to mountPath/certFile

resources.description: Kubernetes resource requests and limits

targetCPUUtilizationPercentage.description: Target CPU utilization percentage for autoscaling
